result.summary: The page appears to have horizontal overflow/clipping issues on the right side, causing some navigation tabs and game tiles to be cut off. There are no obvious critical failures, but the layout looks cramped and partially hidden in several sections.

issues.description: The top category row is clipped on the right edge, with the 'Hot Games' tab only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the responsive layout so all category pills fit within the viewport or make the row clearly scrollable with proper padding and scroll affordance.

issues.description: Several game cards in the featured sections are cut off at the right edge, making the third column partially hidden.
issues.suggestion: Fix the grid/container width or card sizing to prevent overflow on mobile, or convert the rows into an intentional horizontal carousel with visible scrolling behavior.
